items.title: Reliance Industries hits new 52-week high on AGM cues
items.contentSnippet: Reliance Industries surged 3.2% intraday after the AGM announcement.

items.title: TCS posts strong Q4 numbers, beats estimates
items.contentSnippet: TCS revenue grew 13% YoY in Q4 with all-time-high deal wins.

items.title: Nifty closes at fresh peak ahead of RBI meeting
items.contentSnippet: Nifty50 ended 0.7% higher on broad-based buying.
